signal.title: Criteo patent: “Shopper graph linking in-store and open-web events”
signal.summary: IP filing reinforces Criteo’s commerce identity graph; highlights an opportunity for Kargo to bridge retail audiences into high-impact offsite creative.
signal.rawExcerpt: Methods for linking hashed transaction identifiers with anonymized open-web engagement events for bid-time audience resolution…

source.name: USPTO Patents
source.description: Patent filings and grants for auction, creative, identity, and measurement tech.
